data.body: 6168 IMPLEMENTED + held-out validated: full E2E oracle 7 passed (wheel-from-sdist bakes REBAR_BUILD_COMMIT; empty-env fails; sdist ships _build_info; install-from-sdist preserves COMMIT). Real build proof confirmed. Teeth: E2E was RED (COMMIT=None) before fix. Cleaned subagent's extend-exclude (formatted test files). make lint+typecheck+module-size clean, 46 passed. Committed 901a463a2->amended, rebar-ticket trailer added, pushed as change 719. Polling + make test.
